{"query":"SpaceXAI Grok 4 availability Premium+ SuperGrok API real-time search native tool use announcement","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1714,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://x.ai/news/grok-4-5","title":"Introducing Grok 4.5 | SpaceXAI","content":"2 days ago — Today, we're launching Grok 4.5, SpaceXAI's smartest model built to excel at coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work.Read more
The result is more intelligent and efficient reasoning on real engineering and agentic tasks."},{"url":"https://x.ai/news/grok-4","title":"Grok 4 | SpaceXAI","content":"It includes native tool use and real-time search integration, and is available now to SuperGrok and Premium+ subscribers, as well as through the xAI API.
Grok 4 was trained with reinforcement learning to use tools.
Grok 4 represents a leap in frontier intelligence, setting a new state-of-the-art for closed models on ARC-AGI V2 with 15.9% (nearly double Opus's ~8.6%, +8pp over previous high).
The Grok 4 API empowers developers with frontier-level multimodal understanding, a 256,000 context window, and advanced reasoning capabilities to tackle complex tasks across text and vision.
It integrates real-time data search across X, the web, and various news sources via our newly launched live search API, enabling up-to-date, accurate responses powered by native tool use.
With enterprise-grade security and compliance—including SOC 2 Type 2, GDPR, and CCPA certifications—the API ensures robust protection for sensitive applications."},{"url":"https://coursiv.io/blog/spacexai","title":"SpaceXAI: xAI Rebrand, SpaceX Deal & Grok Explained | Coursiv Blog","content":"Did SpaceX acquire xAI? — Yes. xAI’s official announcement is dated February 2, 2026.
July 9, 2025 — xAI announced Grok 4. — Grok became a more serious frontier-model competitor with API and subscriber access.
May-July 2026 — xAI/SpaceXAI product pages expanded across Grok Build, voice, Imagine, integrations, and Colossus. — The product portfolio became broader than a chatbot.
A company with models, APIs, coding agents, voice, media, RAG/files, remote tools, and enterprise controls has another.
SpaceXAI has released a new Grok version.
Search and community chatter around Gemini 3.5 Pro spiked at the same time, because Google had already shipped Gemini 3.5 Flash and had signaled that a stronger Pro model was coming.
Short answer: as of this July 7, 2026 source check, Gemini 3.5 Pro does not appear to be generally available as a public API model.
February 2, 2026: xAI announced that SpaceX acquired xAI.
July 6, 2026: the linked X account posted that it is now @SpaceXAI.
The smartest read is: SpaceXAI is xAI’s next chapter as a SpaceX-integrated AI platform, not a standalone product launch by itself.
The July 2026 @SpaceXAI post is a later public rebrand signal.
Coursiv editorial team covering AI tools, product updates, and practical workflows for everyday professionals."},{"url":"https://techjacksolutions.com/ai-tools/grok/what-is-grok-4-3/","title":"What Is Grok 4.3: Definitive Guide 2026","content":"It launched on April 17, 2026 with a December 2025 knowledge cutoff, an improved architecture, native video input, document generation for PDFs, spreadsheets and slides, and better tool-calling than the versions before it.
Here is the current state of the lineup as of June 2026.
Second, xAI retires versions quickly: Grok 3 was pulled in May 2026 and its traffic now redirects to 4.3.
API Pricing (per 1M tokens)
SWE-bench Verified (coding)
GPQA Diamond (graduate science)

{"query":"SpaceXAI Grok 4 availability Premium+ SuperGrok API real-time search native tool use announcement","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://builtin.com/artificial-intelligence/grok-4","title":"What Is Grok 4? Elon Musk’s Newest AI Model, Explained | Built In","content":"Grok 4 is one of xAI’s most intelligent models yet, touting real-time search, agentic capabilities and unmatched performance. A more powerful, Grok 4 Heavy version is out too, available only through a $300/month SuperGrok Heavy subscription. Summary:  Elon Musk’s xAI has launched Grok 4, one of its most powerful models yet, touting real-time search, tool use and top-tier performance. more   Elon Musk’s xAI has launched Grok 4, one of its most powerful models yet, touting real-time search, tool use and top-tier performance. Positioned as a major step forward in both reasoning and problem-solving, Grok 4 introduces features like native tool use, real-time search and scaled reinforcement learning — capabilities that xAI claims put it on par with (or even ahead of) models developedby competitors like OpenAI, Google and Anthropic. Grok 4 Heavy is a more advanced version of the Grok 4 model, and it is only available through xAI’s new SuperGrok Heavy subscription tier.","score":0.70287734,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://x.ai/news/grok-4","title":"Grok 4 | SpaceXAI","content":"Grok 4 is the most intelligent model in the world. We are also introducing a new SuperGrok Heavy tier with access to Grok 4 Heavy - the most powerful version of Grok 4. With Grok 3, we scaled next-token prediction pretraining to unprecedented levels, resulting in a model with unparalleled world knowledge and performance. During our work on Grok 3 Reasoning, we noticed scaling trends that suggested it would be possible to scale up our reinforcement learning training significantly. For Grok 4, we utilized Colossus, our 200,000 GPU cluster, to run reinforcement learning training that refines Grok's reasoning abilities at pretraining scale. ## Native Tool Use. Grok 4 was trained with reinforcement learning to use tools. Grok 4 Heavy leads USAMO'25 with 61.9%, and is the first to score 50.7% on Humanity's Last Exam (text-only subset), demonstrating unparalleled capabilities in complex reasoning through scaled reinforcement learning and native tool use.","score":0.6729558,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=p_liyH8Pdqw","title":"Grok 4 Live Search: Learn Everything in the xAI API","content":"Grok 4 Live Search: Learn Everything in the xAI API
SwiftUI Animation & Agentic Coding 
4850 subscribers
5 likes
548 views
13 Jul 2025
Live search in Grok 4 lets you retrieve real-time information from the web and X timelines. You can customize the data you want to retrieve with live search in many ways, like limiting citations, setting a date range, getting live data from a specific country/region, retrieving the most favorite/viewed X posts, and more. This video teaches you everything about live search using the xAI AI SDK.

Stay updated with the latest news, research, and developments in the world of generative AI. # xAI Introduces Grok 4. xAI’s Grok 4 model. Elon Musk and xAI have officially launched Grok 4, their most powerful AI model yet. The new model is set to compete with Google’s Gemini 2.5 Pro and OpenAI’s upcoming GPT-5 model, which is expected to be launched later this summer. The new model is trained on xAI’s Colossus supercomputer for advanced, scientist-grade reasoning. During the stream, Elon said, *“With respect to academic questions, Grok 4 is better than PhD level in every subject, no exceptions.”* He also mentioned that we’re entering a new era in AI, something he called *“Big Bang Intelligence.”*. ### What’s New In Grok 4. * **Normal Version**: The normal version of Grok 4 is a single-agent model. * **Grok 4 Heavy:** This is a multi-agent model. ## Published in Generative AI.","score":0.38089764,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.instagram.com/reel/DYxjdrJP0ze","title":"Instagram","content":"By continuing, you agree to Instagram's Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
